title: 2025.5.07Introducing Stripe's new public preview release channelSummary:Discover the benefits of Stripe's new public preview release channel, designed to provide early access to cutting-edge API features before their general availability. Start innovating faster with Stripe’s latest offerings while sharing your feedback to shape future developments!Author:Paul AndersonTopic:SessionsRead
